zh.lifeSummary: 當Eléonore de Melun於大約1239年出生在法國瑟-吉馬內默倫時，她的父親Adam De Melun III36歲，母親Constance de Sancerre Comtessa de Sancerre et Nesle19歲。她於大約1255年與Gauthier IV "the Chamberlain" de Villebéon結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Melun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Alvar, Anders, Hilmer, Hiltrud, Sven.

Swedish: probably an ornamental or habitational name formed with the (placename) element mel, from Old Norse methal ‘mid, middle’, + the adjectival suffix -in, a derivative of Latin -in(i)us ‘relating to’.
Czech (Melín): from a pet form of the personal name Melichar ‘Melchior’.

variants.name: Lemelin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Normand, Monique, Alcide, Armand, Damien, Emile, Gaston, Marcel, Rosaire.
French: from the personal name Melin (see Melin 4) or its cognate Emelin, with fused definite article l(e).
History: Jean Lemelin dit (Le) Tourangeau from Chartres in Eure-et-Loir, France, married Marguerite Brassard in Quebec City, QC, in 1658.

variants.name: Melichar
meanings: Czech; Slovak (also Melichár): from a vernacular form of the Biblical personal name Melchior .

variants.name: Meline
meanings: French: from a shortened form of the personal name Ameline, feminine form of Amelin (see Melin 4).

nameMeanings.name: Eléonore
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Eléonore de Melun was born about 1239, in Melun, Seine-et-Marne, France, her father, Adam De Melun III, was 36 and her mother, Constance de Sancerre Comtessa de Sancerre et Nesle, was 19. She married Gauthier IV "the Chamberlain" de Villebéon about 1255. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eléonore de Melun est née environ 1239, à Melun, Seine-et-Marne, France, son père, Adam De Melun III, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Constance de Sancerre Comtessa de Sancerre et Nesle, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Gauthier IV "the Chamberlain" de Villebéon environ 1255. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eléonore de Melun um 1239 in Melun, Seine-et-Marne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Adam De Melun III 36 und ihre Mutter Constance de Sancerre Comtessa de Sancerre et Nesle 19. Sie hat um 1255 Gauthier IV "the Chamberlain" de Villebéon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter.

Lei sposato Gauthier IV "the Chamberlain" de Villebéon circa 1255. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie.

ko.lifeSummary: Eléonore de Melun(이)가 대략 1239년 프랑스 세이인-트-마니 멜루에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Adam De Melun III(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Constance de Sancerre Comtessa de Sancerre et Nesle(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1255년 Gauthier IV "the Chamberlain" de Villebéon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eléonore de Melun родилась около 1239 г. в местности мелун, сине-ет-марн, Франция, её отцу по имени Adam De Melun III было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Constance de Sancerre Comtessa de Sancerre et Nesle, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gauthier IV "the Chamberlain" de Villebéon около 1255 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери.
